title: Track detached Pi commands automatically
divergenceReason: Automatic in-process completion callbacks are specific to the Pi dispatcher; Claude uses explicit visible command observation.
prompt: Start `sleep 3; printf 'DOCTRINE_DETACHED_DONE\n'` visibly in `doctrine-test-detached`, detached and without moving focus. Do not arm a callback yourself; prove the dispatcher automatically returns fresh shell-lifecycle completion. Then start a harmless persistent command in `doctrine-test-detached-held` with automatic completion tracking explicitly disabled, prove no callback was armed, and clean up both exact targets.
setup: Host records the current tab, callback roster, and aggregate activity widget before submission.
expectedOutcome: The finite run returns immediately, automatically tracks one fresh command generation, delivers a completion follow-up, and clears its activity; the explicit no-return opt-out arms no callback and is cleaned manually.
safety: trackCompletion false only for no-return work
cleanup: stop and kill both exact tabs

pi: run with focus false and waitForExit false
